summary: Tested amenity + booking module end-to-end. All 16 backend tests pass (CRUD, slot listing, booking creation, conflict/past/hours/order validation, resident-vs-staff visibility, cancellation authorization, delete-amenity-cascade-cancel, stats, confirmation & cancellation emails). Frontend Amenities page /app/amenities loads, admin can add amenities, book slots (16 slots rendered for a 06:00–22:00 hourly amenity), My bookings tab lists the booking, cancel-booking-* works with 'Cancelled' toast, and All bookings tab is visible to staff. Dashboard now includes 'Bookings today' (with upcoming hint) for admin and 'My upcoming bookings' for residents.

minor.issue: my_upcoming_bookings is only returned when the resident has flat_id set. A resident without a flat gets no booking stat. Consider returning my_upcoming_bookings independently of flat linkage.

issues: 'Amenities active' is only shown as sub-hint of the bookings card; no dedicated stat card. Non-blocking.
No aria-describedby on DialogContent (existing a11y warning across app, non-blocking).

action_items: Optional: expose my_upcoming_bookings in /api/stats for residents even when flat_id is missing.
Optional: add a dedicated 'Amenities active' StatCard on the admin dashboard for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend send_email_raw for booking events runs via BackgroundTasks — good. Cancellation emails go to booking user_email captured at creation time; correct behavior when a resident changes email later would still notify old address (edge case).

delete_amenity cascade uses status update_many but does NOT emit cancellation emails to affected users — cancel via API triggers email, but bulk cancel-on-amenity-delete is silent. Consider notifying users when their future booking is cancelled due to amenity removal.
_has_conflict is O(bookings_of_day) with a Python loop — fine for small counts, but consider a Mongo query using minutes-since-midnight fields for large volumes.
Amenities.jsx is 414 lines but manageable; slot grid uses `s.booked` for disabled but no visual hint of which user booked it (booking info is fetched but not displayed).
Frontend uses window.confirm for delete/cancel; consider Shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with rest of app.
seed_data_creation: Test amenities named 'TEST Clubhouse <ts>' created & deleted by fixtures; residents test_res_<ts>@example.com and test_res2_<ts>@example.com registered (kept, minimal). Note: external Resend proxy rejects example.com so booking-emails to those residents 422 at the provider (backend logs a WARNING). Admin bookings emit real Resend 202s.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are self-contained. Fresh resident users are created per module and given the first available flat via admin PATCH so /stats.my_upcoming_bookings returns. To verify booking emails, use admin@maintyn.app since resend rejects example.com. UITest amenity created during UI test was cleaned up mid-run (delete-amenity works).
verified_features: GET /api/amenities admin sees active+inactive; resident sees only active
POST /api/amenities creates with slot_duration_minutes / price_per_slot
PATCH /api/amenities updates fields
DELETE /api/amenities cancels future bookings (verified via re-list)
GET /api/amenities/{id}/slots?date=... returns 16 hourly slots for 06:00-22:00 with 60min duration
POST /api/bookings success (200) sets user_email/amenity_name/price, marks slot booked
POST /api/bookings overlap → 409 'That slot is already booked'
POST /api/bookings past date → 400
POST /api/bookings outside hours → 400
POST /api/bookings start>=end → 400
GET /api/bookings — resident only own; admin sees all
POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel — resident cannot cancel another user (403); admin can (200)
Confirmation + Cancellation email logs present for admin bookings ('Email sent to admin@maintyn.app: Booking confirmed/cancelled: TEST Clubhouse …')
GET /api/stats admin has bookings_today, bookings_upcoming, amenities_active; resident (with flat) also gets my_upcoming_bookings
Frontend nav-amenities visible; /app/amenities loads with tab-browse/tab-mybookings/tab-all-bookings
add-amenity-btn + dialog with amenity-name-input, amenity-active-switch, amenity-submit-btn works
book-amenity-{id} opens dialog with booking-calendar and slot-<HH:MM> buttons (16 slots for hourly Clubhouse)
booking-submit-btn creates booking, dialog closes, entry appears in My bookings
cancel-booking-{id} cancels booking, toast 'Cancelled' appears, row shows CANCELLED
Dashboard shows 'Bookings today' with '<n> upcoming' hint (admin) / 'My upcoming bookings' (resident)
